notes: Solid two-player pong implementation with proper scoring, pause, and game-over states, but arrow keys are mapped to player 1 instead of player 2 (non-standard), ball speed can become erratic due to uncapped vy accumulation on repeated paddle hits, and there's no AI opponent for single-player mode.
Excellent implementation overall, but the control mapping is flawed by assigning the Arrow keys to Player 1 (left) instead of Player 2 (right).
Core Pong works and renders cleanly, but the control scheme is awkward/misassigned for two players and the gameplay lacks polish expected of a strong build.
